title: Academic Laboratory Closing Guide
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4uf7f","text":"A quick guide made to help laboratory assistants close the laboratories for the day.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Check if there's trash on the tables
Make sure the white bins are empty
Add a new bag in the white bins
Check whether there's equipment still plugged in
Check the pipette tips Unless otherwise specified, a minimum of two rows is needed
Check that there's enough stock of disposable consumables
Collect all glassware into the white boxes
Check that there's enough amount of aliquots for the practicals
Bring the dirty glassware to the collection point and check if there's clean glassware
Check that the markers are upside-down
Check whether blue bins are empty enough
Check if they need to be re-aligned
creator: Mar Roca Cugat
